content: Phase 9a: Backend /api/climate/grid endpoint for continuous heatmap data
Phase 9b: Frontend continuous heatmap canvas overlay (IDW interpolated, clipped to India)
Phase 9c: Hover-anywhere cursor inspector (coords + interpolated value + nearest place)
Phase 9d: AI grounding hardening - strict no-hallucination + richer context + citations
Phase 9e: Scientist Lab - multi-variable experiments + comparison + sensitivity
Phase 9f: Testing all new features end-to-end via testing_agent_v3
